creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Created attachment 245825
Weechat 4.1.0

The attached patch 

- updates irc/weechat to version 4.1.0 (released 15.10.2023).
- make ZSTD optional (default on - or should it be off?)

New config format (config_version: 2->3); backup your weechat config files (~/.weechat).
